_comment: Drop this at ~/.ocode/mcp.json or <project>/mcp.json. Comment fields are ignored.

filesystem._comment: Anthropic's reference filesystem server. Pulls from npm.

git._comment: Git operations on the current repo. Python implementation.

ocode-demo._comment: Tiny demo server bundled with ocode — verifies the integration end-to-end.

fetch._comment: Web fetcher; useless for air-gapped work. Disabled by default.
